Precondition: Right end-effector grasping nothing; cup_1 accessible.
cup_1 grasped by right end-effector; table top available for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 placed on table; right end-effector grasping nothing.

Precondition: Right end-effector free; box_2 right side accessible.
Postcondition: box_2 pushed (repositioned) to clear access to box_1.

Precondition: box_1 accessible for dual-arm grasp; both end-effectors grasping nothing.
Postcondition: box_1 grasped with dual-arm symmetric grasp.
